oatmeal_0.text: A bowl of oatmeal. Room temperature. A little brown. It does not look appetizing.

pot_1.text: The broken clay on your hands was all the answer I needed. Today you shall pay your debt of suffering and pain to all those innocent souls you have shattered with your indifference and sadistic delight.
pot_1.name: Clay Pot

pot_choice.name: Clay Pot
pot_choice.text: Just a...[delay=1.0]out of curiosity...[delay=1.0]as a gamer, how many pots would you say you have...[delay=1.0]accidentally...[delay=1.0]or otherwise...[delay=1.0]destroyed?[delay=1.0] Roughly?

pot_yes.text: You almost sound proud of your heinous deeds! Today you shall pay your debt of suffering to all those whom you have shattered with indifference and delight.
pot_yes.name: Angry Pot

pot_no.text: Liar! The broken clay on your hands was answer enough! Today you shall pay your debt of suffering to all those whom you have shattered with indifference and delight.
pot_no.name: Angry Pot
